issues: Lack of distinct visual depth and polish, leading to a flat appearance.
Generic typography, lacking a unique brand voice or intentional pairing.
Vertical spacing inconsistencies between major sections and the 'Add/Edit Transaction' form feels tacked on.
strengths: Comprehensive and realistic data population across all sections and charts.
Clean, functional dark theme color system with appropriate accent usage.
Clear organization of content into distinct, well-defined sections.
specific_improvements: Introduce subtle, consistent shadows and/or background textures to add visual depth to cards and elevated elements.
Implement a secondary display font for major headings or refine existing typography with more intentional letter/line spacing and dramatic sizing for hero elements.
Refine vertical spacing between content blocks for a more harmonious rhythm and better integrate the 'Add/Edit Transaction' form visually.
